cases.name: movement treats unlisted terrain matrix entries as impassable
surface movement consumes screenshot terrain mobility costs
surface unit respects enemy zoc but can pass through friendly units
surface underling exposes bury plus move destinations and move attack targets
surface underling without attack target can still move and bury
buried underling can move underground or unbury
buried underling can unbury attack when a target is in range
destroyer uses aquatic terrain costs and cannot enter land
helicopter crosses mixed terrain but ocean stays impassable
salamander mixes land and water costs while mountain stays impassable
submerged submarine can move under a surface ship across underwater terrain
borfly shows current submerged targets but no move attack previews
